[selective-attention]  [LF]Student: The relation \(q(y) + r(y)\) when dividing makes me think of polynomial roots if \(y + 3\) is a factor of \(q(y) + r(y)\). [LF][LF]### Key Take-aways  [LF]• Use the factor theorem to test whether \(y + 3\) is a root: evaluate \(p(-3)\).
